cases.description: With an odd count of numbers, MEDIAN is the single middle value once sorted
With an even count of numbers, MEDIAN averages the two middle values
cases.expected_note: Sorted: 1,2,3,4 -> middle two are 2 and 3 -> average 2.5

cases.description: Text values and blank cells in a range argument are ignored (not counted as 0 and not counted toward the element count)
cases.expected_note: Only 10, 20, 30 are numeric -> odd count of 3 -> middle value is 20; if blanks/text counted as 0 this would shift the median

cases.description: Degenerate single-value case returns that value
